{
  "rules": [
    {
      "parameter": "gen.engine_cylinder_configuration",
      "operator": "==",
      "value": "multi-cylinder",
      "unit": null,

      "quote": "Engine shall be a multi-cylinder, turbocharged, charge air-cooled, 4-stroke diesel engine designed for standby duty."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "gen.engine_aspiration",
      "operator": "==",
      "value": "turbocharged",
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Engine shall be a multi-cylinder, turbocharged, charge air-cooled, 4-stroke diesel engine designed for standby duty."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "gen.engine_charge_air_cooling",
      "operator": "==",
      "value": "yes",
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Engine shall be a multi-cylinder, turbocharged, charge air-cooled, 4-stroke diesel engine designed for standby duty."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "gen.engine_strokes",
      "operator": "==",
      "value": "4",
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Engine shall be a multi-cylinder, turbocharged, charge air-cooled, 4-stroke diesel engine designed for standby duty."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "gen.engine_fuel_type",
      "operator": "==",
      "value": "diesel",
      "unit": null,

      "quote": "Engine shall be a multi-cylinder, turbocharged, charge air-cooled, 4-stroke diesel engine designed for standby duty."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "gen.engine_duty_type",
      "operator": "==",
      "value": "standby",
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Engine shall be a multi-cylinder, turbocharged, charge air-cooled, 4-stroke diesel engine designed for standby duty."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "gen.emission_standard",
      "operator": "==",
      "value": "CPCB Stage IV or equivalent",
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Engine shall conform to CPCB Stage IV emission norms or equivalent."
    }
  ]
}
